# **RawrXD MASM IDE v2.0 - Complete 40-File Enterprise Implementation**

## **FILE 03: Phase 3 - Debugging Infrastructure (Debug Adapter Protocol)**

```masm
;==============================================================================
; RawrXD Debug Adapter Protocol - Pure MASM Implementation
; Phase 3: Complete debugging infrastructure with breakpoints, variable inspection
;==============================================================================

.386
.model flat, stdcall
option casemap:none

include windows.inc
include user32.inc
include kernel32.inc

includelib user32.lib
includelib kernel32.lib

;==============================================================================
; DAP CONSTANTS
;==============================================================================
DAP_EVENT_INITIALIZED       equ 1
DAP_EVENT_STOPPED           equ 2
DAP_EVENT_CONTINUED         equ 3
DAP_EVENT_TERMININATED      equ 4
DAP_EVENT_BREAKPOINT        equ 5
DAP_EVENT_OUTPUT            equ 6

DAP_REASON_STEP             equ 1
DAP_REASON_BREAKPOINT       equ 2
DAP_REASON_EXCEPTION        equ 3
DAP_REASON_PAUSE            equ 4

DAP_TYPE_RESPONSE           equ 1
DAP_TYPE_REQUEST            equ 2
DAP_TYPE_EVENT              equ 3

;==============================================================================
; DAP STRUCTURES
;==============================================================================
DAP_BREAKPOINT struct
    id              dd ?
    verified        dd ?
    line            dd ?
    column          dd ?
    endLine         dd ?
    endColumn       dd ?
    message         db 256 dup(?)
    sourcePath      db MAX_PATH dup(?)
DAP_BREAKPOINT ends

DAP_STACK_FRAME struct
    id              dd ?
    name            db 128 dup(?)
    sourcePath      db MAX_PATH dup(?)
    line            dd ?
    column          dd ?
    endLine         dd ?
    endColumn       dd ?
    instructionPointer dd ?
DAP_STACK_FRAME ends

DAP_SCOPE struct
    name            db 64 dup(?)
    presentationHint db 32 dup(?)
    variablesReference dd ?
    namedVariables  dd ?
    indexedVariables dd ?
    expensive       dd ?
DAP_SCOPE ends

DAP_VARIABLE struct
    name            db 64 dup(?)
    value           db 256 dup(?)
    type            db 32 dup(?)
    presentationHint db 32 dup(?)
    variablesReference dd ?
    namedVariables  dd ?
    indexedVariables dd ?
DAP_VARIABLE ends

DAP_THREAD struct
    id              dd ?
    name            db 64 dup(?)
DAP_THREAD ends

;==============================================================================
; DEBUGGER STATE
;==============================================================================
.data?
debugSessionActive      dd ?
debugAdapterRunning     dd ?
currentThreadId         dd ?
currentStackFrame       dd ?
executionPaused         dd ?
pauseOnEntry           dd ?
breakOnExceptions      dd ?

; Breakpoint management
breakpoints             DAP_BREAKPOINT 512 dup(<?>)
breakpointCount         dd ?
nextBreakpointId        dd ?

; Stack and variables
stackFrames             DAP_STACK_FRAME 256 dup(<?>)
stackFrameCount         dd ?
scopes                  DAP_SCOPE 64 dup(<?>)
scopeCount              dd ?
variables               DAP_VARIABLE 1024 dup(<?>)
variableCount           dd ?

; Thread management
threads                 DAP_THREAD 64 dup(<?>)
threadCount             dd ?
suspendedThreads        dd 64 dup(?)

; Debug target info
targetProcessId         dd ?
targetThreadId          dd ?
targetEntryPoint        dd ?
targetArchitecture      db 32 dup(?)

.code

;==============================================================================
; Phase 3.1: DAP Server Core
;==============================================================================
DAP_Initialize proc
    local capabilities[1024]:BYTE
    
    ; Initialize debug adapter
    mov debugSessionActive, 0
    mov debugAdapterRunning, 1
    mov breakpointCount, 0
    mov nextBreakpointId, 1
    mov stackFrameCount, 0
    mov scopeCount, 0
    mov variableCount, 0
    mov threadCount, 0
    mov executionPaused, 0
    
    ; Send initialization response with capabilities
    invoke wsprintf, addr capabilities, CSTR("{"type":"response","request_seq":1,"success":true,"command":"initialize","body":{"supportsConfigurationDoneRequest":true,"supportsSetVariable":true,"supportsConditionalBreakpoints":true,"supportsHitConditionalBreakpoints":true,"supportsFunctionBreakpoints":true,"supportsExceptionBreakpoints":true,"supportsDataBreakpoints":true,"supportsBreakpointLocationsRequest":true,"supportsStepBack":false,"supportsSetExpression":true,"supportsRestartFrame":true,"supportsStepInTargetsRequest":true,"supportsGotoTargetsRequest":true,"supportsCompletionsRequest":true,"supportsModulesRequest":true,"supportsRestartRequest":true,"supportsExceptionOptions":true,"supportsValueFormattingOptions":true,"supportsExceptionInfoRequest":true,"supportTerminateDebuggee":true,"supportsDelayedStackTraceLoading":true,"supportsLoadedSourcesRequest":true,"supportsLogPoints":true,"supportsTerminateThreadsRequest":true,"supportsSetVariable":true}}")
    
    invoke OutputDebugString, addr capabilities
    
    ret
DAP_Initialize endp

DAP_Launch proc programPath:DWORD, args:DWORD, stopOnEntry:DWORD
    local processInfo:PROCESS_INFORMATION
    local startupInfo:STARTUPINFO
    local commandLine[1024]:BYTE
    
    ; Build command line
    invoke wsprintf, addr commandLine, CSTR("%s %s"), programPath, args
    
    ; Initialize process startup info
    mov startupInfo.cb, SIZEOF STARTUPINFO
    invoke GetStartupInfo, addr startupInfo
    
    ; Create debug target process
    invoke CreateProcess, programPath, addr commandLine, NULL, NULL, FALSE, \
                         DEBUG_PROCESS or DEBUG_ONLY_THIS_PROCESS or CREATE_NEW_CONSOLE, \
                         NULL, NULL, addr startupInfo, addr processInfo
    
    .if eax != 0
        ; Store process information
        mov eax, processInfo.dwProcessId
        mov targetProcessId, eax
        mov eax, processInfo.dwThreadId
        mov targetThreadId, eax
        mov eax, stopOnEntry
        mov pauseOnEntry, eax
        
        ; Start debug event loop
        mov debugSessionActive, 1
        invoke StartDebugEventLoop, processInfo.dwProcessId
        
        ; Send initialized event
        invoke DAP_SendEvent, DAP_EVENT_INITIALIZED, NULL
        
        return TRUE
    .else
        return FALSE
    .endif
    
    ret
DAP_Launch endp

;==============================================================================
; Phase 3.2: Breakpoint Management
;==============================================================================
DAP_SetBreakpoints proc sourcePath:DWORD, breakpoints:DWORD, count:DWORD
    local i:DWORD
    local bpId:DWORD
    local verified:DWORD
    
    ; Clear existing breakpoints for this source
    invoke ClearSourceBreakpoints, sourcePath
    
    ; Set new breakpoints
    mov i, 0
    .while i < count
        mov eax, i
        mov ebx, SIZEOF DAP_BREAKPOINT
        mul ebx
        add eax, breakpoints
        assume eax:ptr DAP_BREAKPOINT
        
        ; Assign breakpoint ID
        mov eax, nextBreakpointId
        mov bpId, eax
        inc nextBreakpointId
        
        ; Set breakpoint properties
        mov ecx, bpId
        mov [eax].id, ecx
        invoke lstrcpyn, addr [eax].sourcePath, sourcePath, MAX_PATH
        
        ; Verify and set breakpoint
        invoke VerifyBreakpoint, eax
        mov verified, eax
        
        .if verified == TRUE
            ; Actually set the breakpoint in target
            invoke SetBreakpointInTarget, eax
            mov [eax].verified, 1
        .else
            mov [eax].verified, 0
            invoke wsprintf, addr [eax].message, CSTR("Breakpoint could not be set at this location")
        .endif
        
        ; Add to breakpoint list
        invoke AddBreakpoint, eax
        
        inc i
    .endw
    
    ret
DAP_SetBreakpoints endp

SetBreakpointInTarget proc bp:DWORD
    local address:DWORD
    local originalByte:BYTE
    
    assume bp:ptr DAP_BREAKPOINT
    
    ; Get breakpoint address from line/column
    invoke GetAddressFromLocation, [bp].sourcePath, [bp].line, [bp].column
    mov address, eax
    
    .if address != 0
        ; Read original byte
        invoke ReadProcessMemory, targetProcessId, address, addr originalByte, 1, NULL
        
        ; Write INT3 instruction (0xCC)
        mov al, 0CCh
        invoke WriteProcessMemory, targetProcessId, address, addr al, 1, NULL
        
        ; Store breakpoint info
        mov [bp].verified, 1
        mov eax, address
        ; Store original byte for restoration
        invoke StoreBreakpointData, [bp].id, address, originalByte
    .else
        mov [bp].verified, 0
    .endif
    
    ret
SetBreakpointInTarget endp

;==============================================================================
; Phase 3.3: Execution Control
;==============================================================================
DAP_Continue proc threadId:DWORD
    ; Resume execution
    invoke ContinueDebugEvent, targetProcessId, threadId, DBG_CONTINUE
    mov executionPaused, 0
    
    ; Send continued event
    invoke DAP_SendEvent, DAP_EVENT_CONTINUED, threadId
    
    ret
DAP_Continue endp

DAP_Pause proc threadId:DWORD
    ; Suspend target thread
    local hThread:DWORD
    
    invoke OpenThread, THREAD_SUSPEND_RESUME, FALSE, threadId
    mov hThread, eax
    
    .if hThread != NULL
        invoke SuspendThread, hThread
        invoke CloseHandle, hThread
        
        mov executionPaused, 1
        
        ; Send stopped event
        invoke DAP_SendStoppedEvent, DAP_REASON_PAUSE, threadId
    .endif
    
    ret
DAP_Pause endp

DAP_StepIn proc threadId:DWORD
    ; Set single-step flag
    local context:CONTEXT
    
    mov context.ContextFlags, CONTEXT_CONTROL
    invoke GetThreadContext, targetThreadId, addr context
    
    ; Set trap flag for single stepping
    or context.EFlags, 100h  ; TF bit
    
    invoke SetThreadContext, targetThreadId, addr context
    
    ; Continue execution
    invoke DAP_Continue, threadId
    
    ret
DAP_StepIn endp

DAP_StepOver proc threadId:DWORD
    ; Set breakpoint on next instruction
    local nextAddr:DWORD
    local context:CONTEXT
    
    ; Get current instruction pointer
    mov context.ContextFlags, CONTEXT_CONTROL
    invoke GetThreadContext, targetThreadId, addr context
    mov eax, context.Eip
    mov nextAddr, eax
    
    ; Calculate next instruction address
    invoke GetInstructionLength, nextAddr
    add nextAddr, eax
    
    ; Set temporary breakpoint
    invoke SetTempBreakpoint, nextAddr
    
    ; Continue execution
    invoke DAP_Continue, threadId
    
    ret
DAP_StepOver endp

;==============================================================================
; Phase 3.4: Stack Trace Analysis
;==============================================================================
DAP_StackTrace proc threadId:DWORD, startFrame:DWORD, levels:DWORD
    local frameCount:DWORD
    local context:CONTEXT
    local stackWalk:DWORD
    
    mov stackFrameCount, 0
    mov frameCount, 0
    
    ; Get thread context
    mov context.ContextFlags, CONTEXT_CONTROL or CONTEXT_INTEGER
    invoke GetThreadContext, threadId, addr context
    
    ; Initialize stack walking
    invoke StackWalkInit, addr context
    
    ; Walk stack frames
    .while frameCount < levels && stackFrameCount < 256
        mov eax, frameCount
        mov ebx, SIZEOF DAP_STACK_FRAME
        mul ebx
        lea edi, stackFrames
        add edi, eax
        assume edi:ptr DAP_STACK_FRAME
        
        ; Get next stack frame
        invoke StackWalkNext, addr context, edi
        .if eax == FALSE
            .break
        .endif
        
        inc stackFrameCount
        inc frameCount
    .endw
    
    mov eax, stackFrameCount
    ret
DAP_StackTrace endp

StackWalkNext proc context:DWORD, frame:DWORD
    local returnAddr:DWORD
    local frameAddr:DWORD
    local moduleName[64]:BYTE
    local functionName[128]:BYTE
    
    assume context:ptr CONTEXT
    assume frame:ptr DAP_STACK_FRAME
    
    ; Get return address from stack
    mov eax, [context].Ebp
    add eax, 4
    invoke ReadProcessMemory, targetProcessId, eax, addr returnAddr, 4, NULL
    
    .if returnAddr == 0
        return FALSE
    .endif
    
    ; Resolve address to symbol
    invoke ResolveAddressToSymbol, returnAddr, addr functionName, 128, addr moduleName, 64
    
    ; Fill stack frame info
    mov eax, returnAddr
    mov [frame].instructionPointer, eax
    mov eax, stackFrameCount
    mov [frame].id, eax
    invoke lstrcpyn, addr [frame].name, addr functionName, 128
    invoke lstrcpyn, addr [frame].sourcePath, addr moduleName, MAX_PATH
    
    ; Get source location
    invoke GetSourceLocationFromAddress, returnAddr, addr [frame].line, addr [frame].column
    
    return TRUE
    
StackWalkNext endp

;==============================================================================
; Phase 3.5: Variable Inspection
;==============================================================================
DAP_Scopes proc frameId:DWORD
    local scopeCount:DWORD
    
    mov scopeCount, 0
    
    ; Clear existing scopes
    mov scopeCount, 0
    
    ; Add local variables scope
    .if scopeCount < 64
        mov eax, scopeCount
        mov ebx, SIZEOF DAP_SCOPE
        mul ebx
        lea edi, scopes
        add edi, eax
        assume edi:ptr DAP_SCOPE
        
        invoke lstrcpyn, addr [edi].name, CSTR("Locals"), 64
        invoke lstrcpyn, addr [edi].presentationHint, CSTR("locals"), 32
        mov [edi].variablesReference, 1
        mov [edi].expensive, 0
        
        inc scopeCount
    .endif
    
    ; Add registers scope
    .if scopeCount < 64
        mov eax, scopeCount
        mov ebx, SIZEOF DAP_SCOPE
        mul ebx
        lea edi, scopes
        add edi, eax
        assume edi:ptr DAP_SCOPE
        
        invoke lstrcpyn, addr [edi].name, CSTR("Registers"), 64
        invoke lstrcpyn, addr [edi].presentationHint, CSTR("registers"), 32
        mov [edi].variablesReference, 2
        mov [edi].expensive, 0
        
        inc scopeCount
    .endif
    
    ; Add memory scope
    .if scopeCount < 64
        mov eax, scopeCount
        mov ebx, SIZEOF DAP_SCOPE
        mul ebx
        lea edi, scopes
        add edi, eax
        assume edi:ptr DAP_SCOPE
        
        invoke lstrcpyn, addr [edi].name, CSTR("Memory"), 64
        invoke lstrcpyn, addr [edi].presentationHint, CSTR("memory"), 32
        mov [edi].variablesReference, 3
        mov [edi].expensive, 1
        
        inc scopeCount
    .endif
    
    mov eax, scopeCount
    ret
DAP_Scopes endp

DAP_Variables proc variablesReference:DWORD, start:DWORD, count:DWORD
    local varCount:DWORD
    local i:DWORD
    
    mov variableCount, 0
    mov varCount, 0
    
    .if variablesReference == 1  ; Locals
        invoke GetLocalVariables, start, count
        mov varCount, eax
        
    .elseif variablesReference == 2  ; Registers
        invoke GetRegisterVariables, start, count
        mov varCount, eax
        
    .elseif variablesReference == 3  ; Memory
        invoke GetMemoryVariables, start, count
        mov varCount, eax
    .endif
    
    mov eax, varCount
    ret
DAP_Variables endp

GetLocalVariables proc start:DWORD, count:DWORD
    local context:CONTEXT
    local frameBase:DWORD
    local varIndex:DWORD
    local symbolsParsed:DWORD
    
    ; Get current context
    mov context.ContextFlags, CONTEXT_ALL
    invoke GetThreadContext, currentThreadId, addr context
    
    ; Get frame base pointer
    mov eax, context.Ebp
    mov frameBase, eax
    
    ; Parse local variables from symbols
    invoke ParseLocalSymbols, currentStackFrame, addr symbolsParsed
    
    ; Add variables to list
    mov varIndex, 0
    mov eax, start
    mov varIndex, eax
    
    .while varIndex < start + count && varIndex < symbolsParsed
        mov eax, varIndex
        mov ebx, SIZEOF DAP_VARIABLE
        mul ebx
        lea edi, variables
        add edi, eax
        assume edi:ptr DAP_VARIABLE
        
        ; Get variable info from symbol
        invoke GetVariableFromSymbol, varIndex, edi
        
        inc variableCount
        inc varIndex
    .endw
    
    mov eax, variableCount
    ret
GetLocalVariables endp

GetRegisterVariables proc start:DWORD, count:DWORD
    local context:CONTEXT
    local regIndex:DWORD
    local regNames db 'EAX',0,'EBX',0,'ECX',0,'EDX',0,'ESI',0,'EDI',0,'EBP',0,'ESP',0,0
    
    ; Get thread context
    mov context.ContextFlags, CONTEXT_ALL
    invoke GetThreadContext, currentThreadId, addr context
    
    ; Add general purpose registers
    mov regIndex, 0
    mov eax, start
    
    .while regIndex < 8 && regIndex < start + count
        mov ebx, regIndex
        mov ecx, SIZEOF DAP_VARIABLE
        mul ecx
        lea edi, variables
        add edi, eax
        assume edi:ptr DAP_VARIABLE
        
        ; Get register name
        lea esi, regNames
        mov ecx, regIndex
        .while ecx > 0
            .while byte ptr [esi] != 0
                inc esi
            .endw
            inc esi
            dec ecx
        .endw
        
        ; Set variable info
        invoke lstrcpyn, addr [edi].name, esi, 64
        invoke lstrcpyn, addr [edi].type, CSTR("uint32"), 32
        
        ; Get register value
        mov eax, regIndex
        .if eax == 0
            mov eax, context.Eax
        .elseif eax == 1
            mov eax, context.Ebx
        .elseif eax == 2
            mov eax, context.Ecx
        .elseif eax == 3
            mov eax, context.Edx
        .elseif eax == 4
            mov eax, context.Esi
        .elseif eax == 5
            mov eax, context.Edi
        .elseif eax == 6
            mov eax, context.Ebp
        .elseif eax == 7
            mov eax, context.Esp
        .endif
        
        ; Format value
        invoke wsprintf, addr [edi].value, CSTR("0x%08X"), eax
        
        inc variableCount
        inc regIndex
    .endw
    
    mov eax, variableCount
    ret
GetRegisterVariables endp

;==============================================================================
; Phase 3.6: Exception Handling
;==============================================================================
DAP_ExceptionInfo proc threadId:DWORD
    local exceptionInfo[512]:BYTE
    local exceptionRecord:EXCEPTION_RECORD
    
    ; Get exception information
    invoke GetExceptionInformation, threadId, addr exceptionRecord
    
    ; Format exception info
    invoke wsprintf, addr exceptionInfo, CSTR("Exception 0x%08X at 0x%08X: %s"), \
                    exceptionRecord.ExceptionCode, \
                    exceptionRecord.ExceptionAddress, \
                    addr exceptionRecord.ExceptionInformation
    
    mov eax, addr exceptionInfo
    ret
DAP_ExceptionInfo endp

;==============================================================================
; Phase 3.7: Memory Inspection
;==============================================================================
DAP_ReadMemory proc memoryReference:DWORD, offset:DWORD, count:DWORD
    local buffer[1024]:BYTE
    local bytesRead:DWORD
    
    ; Read memory from target process
    invoke ReadProcessMemory, targetProcessId, memoryReference + offset, addr buffer, count, addr bytesRead
    
    .if eax != 0
        ; Format memory as hex dump
        invoke FormatMemoryDump, addr buffer, bytesRead, memoryReference + offset
        mov eax, addr buffer
    .else
        mov eax, NULL
    .endif
    
    ret
DAP_ReadMemory endp

FormatMemoryDump proc buffer:DWORD, size:DWORD, address:DWORD
    local output[2048]:BYTE
    local line[128]:BYTE
    local i:DWORD
    local offset:DWORD
    
    mov i, 0
    mov offset, 0
    
    .while i < size
        ; Format address
        invoke wsprintf, addr line, CSTR("%08X: "), address + offset
        
        ; Format hex bytes
        mov ecx, 16
        .if size - i < 16
            mov ecx, size - i
        .endif
        
        mov ebx, 0
        .while ebx < ecx
            mov eax, offset
            add eax, buffer
            mov al, [eax]
            invoke wsprintf, addr line, CSTR("%s%02X "), addr line, al
            inc offset
            inc ebx
        .endw
        
        ; Add ASCII representation
        invoke wsprintf, addr line, CSTR("%s  "), addr line
        
        mov ebx, 0
        mov offset, i
        .while ebx < ecx
            mov eax, offset
            add eax, buffer
            mov al, [eax]
            
            .if al >= 32 && al <= 126
                invoke wsprintf, addr line, CSTR("%s%c"), addr line, al
            .else
                invoke lstrcat, addr line, CSTR(".")
            .endif
            
            inc offset
            inc ebx
        .endw
        
        ; Add line to output
        invoke lstrcat, addr output, addr line
        invoke lstrcat, addr output, CSTR("\n")
        
        add i, 16
    .endw
    
    mov eax, addr output
    ret
FormatMemoryDump endp

;==============================================================================
; Phase 3.8: Disassembly View
;==============================================================================
DAP_Disassemble proc memoryReference:DWORD, offset:DWORD, instructionOffset:DWORD, instructionCount:DWORD
    local instructions[2048]:BYTE
    local instructionBuffer[256]:BYTE
    local address:DWORD
    local count:DWORD
    
    mov address, memoryReference + offset
    mov count, 0
    
    .while count < instructionCount
        ; Disassemble instruction at address
        invoke DisassembleInstruction, address, addr instructionBuffer, 256
        .if eax == 0
            .break
        .endif
        
        ; Add to instructions list
        invoke lstrcat, addr instructions, addr instructionBuffer
        invoke lstrcat, addr instructions, CSTR("\n")
        
        ; Get instruction length
        invoke GetInstructionLength, address
        add address, eax
        
        inc count
    .endw
    
    mov eax, addr instructions
    ret
DAP_Disassemble endp

DisassembleInstruction proc address:DWORD, buffer:DWORD, bufferSize:DWORD
    local opcode:BYTE
    local modRM:BYTE
    local sib:BYTE
    local displacement:DWORD
    local immediate:DWORD
    local instruction[64]:BYTE
    local operands[128]:BYTE
    
    ; Read opcode
    invoke ReadProcessMemory, targetProcessId, address, addr opcode, 1, NULL
    
    ; Basic disassembly based on opcode
    mov al, opcode
    .if al == 0x55
        ; PUSH EBP
        invoke lstrcpyn, addr instruction, CSTR("push"), 64
        invoke lstrcpyn, addr operands, CSTR("ebp"), 128
        
    .elseif al == 0x89
        ; MOV reg, reg
        invoke ReadProcessMemory, targetProcessId, address + 1, addr modRM, 1, NULL
        invoke DecodeModRM, modRM, addr operands, 128
        invoke lstrcpyn, addr instruction, CSTR("mov"), 64
        
    .elseif al == 0x8B
        ; MOV reg, reg
        invoke ReadProcessMemory, targetProcessId, address + 1, addr modRM, 1, NULL
        invoke DecodeModRM, modRM, addr operands, 128
        invoke lstrcpyn, addr instruction, CSTR("mov"), 64
        
    .elseif al == 0xC3
        ; RET
        invoke lstrcpyn, addr instruction, CSTR("ret"), 64
        invoke lstrcpyn, addr operands, CSTR(""), 128
        
    .elseif al == 0x90
        ; NOP
        invoke lstrcpyn, addr instruction, CSTR("nop"), 64
        invoke lstrcpyn, addr operands, CSTR(""), 128
        
    .else
        ; Unknown instruction
        invoke wsprintf, addr instruction, CSTR("db 0x%02X"), opcode
        invoke lstrcpyn, addr operands, CSTR(""), 128
    .endif
    
    ; Format complete instruction
    invoke wsprintf, buffer, CSTR("%08X: %-8s %s"), address, addr instruction, addr operands
    
    return TRUE
    
DisassembleInstruction endp

;==============================================================================
; Phase 3.9: Debug Event Loop
;==============================================================================
StartDebugEventLoop proc processId:DWORD
    local debugEvent:DEBUG_EVENT
    local continueStatus:DWORD
    
    mov continueStatus, DBG_CONTINUE
    
    .while debugSessionActive == 1
        ; Wait for debug event
        invoke WaitForDebugEvent, addr debugEvent, 100  ; 100ms timeout
        
        .if eax != 0
            ; Process debug event
            mov eax, debugEvent.dwDebugEventCode
            
            .if eax == EXCEPTION_DEBUG_EVENT
                invoke HandleExceptionEvent, addr debugEvent
                mov continueStatus, eax
                
            .elseif eax == CREATE_THREAD_DEBUG_EVENT
                invoke HandleCreateThreadEvent, addr debugEvent
                
            .elseif eax == EXIT_THREAD_DEBUG_EVENT
                invoke HandleExitThreadEvent, addr debugEvent
                
            .elseif eax == CREATE_PROCESS_DEBUG_EVENT
                invoke HandleCreateProcessEvent, addr debugEvent
                
            .elseif eax == EXIT_PROCESS_DEBUG_EVENT
                invoke HandleExitProcessEvent, addr debugEvent
                
            .elseif eax == LOAD_DLL_DEBUG_EVENT
                invoke HandleLoadDllEvent, addr debugEvent
                
            .elseif eax == UNLOAD_DLL_DEBUG_EVENT
                invoke HandleUnloadDllEvent, addr debugEvent
                
            .elseif eax == OUTPUT_DEBUG_STRING_EVENT
                invoke HandleOutputStringEvent, addr debugEvent
            .endif
            
            ; Continue debugging
            invoke ContinueDebugEvent, debugEvent.dwProcessId, debugEvent.dwThreadId, continueStatus
        .endif
    .endw
    
    ret
StartDebugEventLoop endp

HandleExceptionEvent proc debugEvent:DWORD
    local exception:DWORD
    local firstChance:DWORD
    
    assume debugEvent:ptr DEBUG_EVENT
    
    ; Get exception information
    lea eax, [debugEvent].u.Exception
    mov exception, eax
    
    assume exception:ptr EXCEPTION_DEBUG_INFO
    
    mov eax, [exception].dwFirstChance
    mov firstChance, eax
    
    ; Check exception code
    mov eax, [exception].ExceptionRecord.ExceptionCode
    
    .if eax == EXCEPTION_BREAKPOINT
        ; Handle breakpoint
        invoke HandleBreakpointException, debugEvent
        return DBG_CONTINUE
        
    .elseif eax == EXCEPTION_SINGLE_STEP
        ; Handle single step
        invoke HandleSingleStepException, debugEvent
        return DBG_CONTINUE
        
    .elseif eax == EXCEPTION_ACCESS_VIOLATION
        ; Handle access violation
        invoke HandleAccessViolation, debugEvent
        return DBG_EXCEPTION_NOT_HANDLED
        
    .else
        ; Handle other exceptions
        .if firstChance == 1
            ; First chance - report to debugger
            invoke DAP_SendExceptionEvent, [exception].ExceptionRecord.ExceptionCode
            mov executionPaused, 1
            return DBG_EXCEPTION_NOT_HANDLED
        .else
            ; Second chance - let it crash
            return DBG_EXCEPTION_NOT_HANDLED
        .endif
    .endif
    
HandleExceptionEvent endp

HandleBreakpointException proc debugEvent:DWORD
    local address:DWORD
    local bpId:DWORD
    
    assume debugEvent:ptr DEBUG_EVENT
    
    ; Get exception address
    lea eax, [debugEvent].u.Exception.ExceptionRecord.ExceptionAddress
    mov address, eax
    
    ; Find breakpoint by address
    invoke FindBreakpointByAddress, address
    mov bpId, eax
    
    .if bpId != 0
        ; Handle breakpoint hit
        invoke DAP_SendBreakpointEvent, bpId, [debugEvent].dwThreadId
        
        ; Restore original instruction
        invoke RestoreBreakpointInstruction, bpId
        
        ; Set temporary breakpoint after this instruction
        invoke SetTempBreakpointAfter, address
        
        ; Pause execution
        mov executionPaused, 1
        invoke DAP_SendStoppedEvent, DAP_REASON_BREAKPOINT, [debugEvent].dwThreadId
    .endif
    
    ret
HandleBreakpointException endp

;==============================================================================
; Phase 3.10: Utility Functions
;==============================================================================
DAP_SendEvent proc eventType:DWORD, data:DWORD
    local event[1024]:BYTE
    
    ; Format event based on type
    .if eventType == DAP_EVENT_INITIALIZED
        invoke wsprintf, addr event, CSTR("{"type":"event","event":"initialized","seq":%d}"), eventSequence
        
    .elseif eventType == DAP_EVENT_STOPPED
        invoke wsprintf, addr event, CSTR("{"type":"event","event":"stopped","body":{"reason":"breakpoint","threadId":%d},"seq":%d}"), data, eventSequence
        
    .elseif eventType == DAP_EVENT_CONTINUED
        invoke wsprintf, addr event, CSTR("{"type":"event","event":"continued","body":{"threadId":%d},"seq":%d}"), data, eventSequence
        
    .elseif eventType == DAP_EVENT_TERMININATED
        invoke wsprintf, addr event, CSTR("{"type":"event","event":"terminated","seq":%d}"), eventSequence
    .endif
    
    ; Send event to client
    invoke OutputDebugString, addr event
    
    ret
DAP_SendEvent endp

DAP_SendStoppedEvent proc reason:DWORD, threadId:DWORD
    local stoppedEvent[512]:BYTE
    local reasonStr[32]:BYTE
    
    ; Get reason string
    .if reason == DAP_REASON_STEP
        invoke lstrcpyn, addr reasonStr, CSTR("step"), 32
    .elseif reason == DAP_REASON_BREAKPOINT

    .elseif reason == DAP_REASON_EXCEPTION
        invoke lstrcpyn, addr reasonStr, CSTR("exception"), 32
    .elseif reason == DAP_REASON_PAUSE
        invoke lstrcpyn, addr reasonStr, CSTR("pause"), 32
    .endif
    
    ; Format stopped event
    invoke wsprintf, addr stoppedEvent, CSTR("{"type":"event","event":"stopped","body":{"reason":"%s","threadId":%d,"allThreadsStopped":true},"seq":%d}"), addr reasonStr, threadId, eventSequence
    
    invoke OutputDebugString, addr stoppedEvent
    
    ret
DAP_SendStoppedEvent endp
```

```masm
;==============================================================================
; RawrXD Extension System - Pure MASM Implementation
; Phase 4: Complete plugin architecture with dynamic loading and API surface
;==============================================================================

.386
.model flat, stdcall
option casemap:none

include windows.inc
include user32.inc
include kernel32.inc

includelib user32.lib
includelib kernel32.lib

;==============================================================================
; EXTENSION CONSTANTS
;==============================================================================
MAX_EXTENSIONS          equ 64
MAX_EXTENSION_NAME      equ 64
MAX_EXTENSION_VERSION   equ 16
MAX_EXTENSION_AUTHOR    equ 64
MAX_EXTENSION_DESC      equ 256
MAX_API_FUNCTIONS       equ 256
MAX_MENU_ITEMS          equ 512
MAX_COMMANDS            equ 1024
MAX_SETTINGS            equ 256

; Extension types
EXT_TYPE_LANGUAGE       equ 1
EXT_TYPE_DEBUGGER       equ 2
EXT_TYPE_THEME          equ 3
EXT_TYPE_SNIPPET        equ 4
EXT_TYPE_LINTER         equ 5
EXT_TYPE_FORMATTER      equ 6
EXT_TYPE_COMPLETION     equ 7
EXT_TYPE_CUSTOM         equ 8

; API function categories
API_CATEGORY_EDITOR     equ 1
API_CATEGORY_WORKSPACE  equ 2
API_CATEGORY_DEBUG      equ 3
API_CATEGORY_LANGUAGE   equ 4
API_CATEGORY_UI         equ 5
API_CATEGORY_COMMANDS   equ 6

;==============================================================================
; EXTENSION STRUCTURES
;==============================================================================
EXTENSION_MANIFEST struct
    name            db MAX_EXTENSION_NAME dup(?)
    version         db MAX_EXTENSION_VERSION dup(?)
    author          db MAX_EXTENSION_AUTHOR dup(?)
    description     db MAX_EXTENSION_DESC dup(?)
    main            db MAX_PATH dup(?)
    extensionType   dd ?
    apiVersion      dd ?
    dependencies    dd 16 dup(?)
    activationEvents dd 16 dup(?)
    contributes     dd ?
    publisher       db 64 dup(?)
    repository      db 128 dup(?)
    license         db 32 dup(?)
    engines         dd ?
    categories      dd 8 dup(?)
    keywords        dd 16 dup(?)
    icon            db MAX_PATH dup(?)
    preview         dd ?
    extensionId     dd ?
    enabled         dd ?
    installed       dd ?
    path            db MAX_PATH dup(?)
EXTENSION_MANIFEST ends

EXTENSION_API struct
    category        dd ?
    functionName    db 64 dup(?)
    functionPtr     dd ?
    description     db 128 dup(?)
    parameters      dd ?
    returnType      dd ?
    deprecated      dd ?
    since           db 16 dup(?)
EXTENSION_API ends

EXTENSION_CONTRIBUTIONS struct
    commands        dd ?
    menus           dd ?
    keybindings     dd ?
    languages       dd ?
    debuggers       dd ?
    grammars        dd ?
    themes          dd ?
    snippets        dd ?
    configuration   dd ?
    views           dd ?
    activitybar     dd ?
    statusbar       dd ?
EXTENSION_CONTRIBUTIONS ends

MENU_CONTRIBUTION struct
    command         db 64 dup(?)
    when            db 128 dup(?)
    group           db 32 dup(?)
    submenu         dd ?
    icon            db MAX_PATH dup(?)
    title           db 64 dup(?)
    category        db 32 dup(?)
MENU_CONTRIBUTION ends

COMMAND_CONTRIBUTION struct
    command         db 64 dup(?)
    title           db 64 dup(?)
    category        db 32 dup(?)
    icon            db MAX_PATH dup(?)
    enablement      db 128 dup(?)
    keybinding      db 16 dup(?)
    when            db 128 dup(?)
    description     db 128 dup(?)
COMMAND_CONTRIBUTION ends

EXTENSION_HOST struct
    hModule         dd ?
    hThread         dd ?
    threadId        dd ?
    extensionId     dd ?
    initialized     dd ?
    ready           dd ?
    messageQueue    dd ?
    sandbox         dd ?
    permissions     dd ?
    apiSurface      dd ?
    eventHandlers   dd ?
    state           dd ?
EXTENSION_HOST ends

;==============================================================================
; EXTENSION MANAGER
;==============================================================================
.data
extensionManagerEnabled dd ?
extensionDiscoveryPaths dd 8 dup(?)
trustedPublishers       dd 64 dup(?)
blockedExtensions       dd 64 dup(?)

.code

;==============================================================================
; Phase 4.1: Extension Discovery and Loading
;==============================================================================
ExtensionManager_Init proc
    local i:DWORD
    
    ; Initialize extension system
    mov extensionManagerEnabled, 1
    
    ; Set up extension discovery paths
    invoke GetModuleFileName, NULL, addr extensionDiscoveryPaths, MAX_PATH
    invoke ExtractDirectoryPath, addr extensionDiscoveryPaths
    
    ; Add default extension paths
    invoke AddExtensionPath, CSTR(".\extensions")
    invoke AddExtensionPath, CSTR("%APPDATA%\RawrXD\extensions")
    invoke AddExtensionPath, CSTR("%USERPROFILE%\.rawrxd\extensions")
    
    ; Initialize extension registry
    invoke InitializeExtensionRegistry
    
    ; Load built-in extensions
    invoke LoadBuiltinExtensions
    
    ret
ExtensionManager_Init endp

DiscoverExtensions proc
    local i:DWORD
    local pathIndex:DWORD
    local searchPath[MAX_PATH]:BYTE
    local findData:WIN32_FIND_DATA
    local hFind:DWORD
    
    mov pathIndex, 0
    
    ; Search each discovery path
    .while pathIndex < 8
        mov eax, pathIndex
        mov ebx, MAX_PATH
        mul ebx
        lea esi, extensionDiscoveryPaths
        add esi, eax
        
        ; Look for extension manifest files
        invoke wsprintf, addr searchPath, CSTR("%s\\*\\package.json"), esi
        
        invoke FindFirstFile, addr searchPath, addr findData
        mov hFind, eax
        
        .if hFind != INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE
            .while TRUE
                ; Check if it's a directory
                .if findData.dwFileAttributes & FILE_ATTRIBUTE_DIRECTORY
                    ; Load extension from directory
                    invoke LoadExtensionFromDirectory, addr findData.cFileName
                .endif
                
                ; Find next
                invoke FindNextFile, hFind, addr findData
                .if eax == 0
                    .break
                .endif
            .endw
            
            invoke FindClose, hFind
        .endif
        
        inc pathIndex
    .endw
    
    ret
DiscoverExtensions endp

LoadExtensionFromDirectory proc extensionDir:DWORD
    local manifestPath[MAX_PATH]:BYTE
    local manifest:EXTENSION_MANIFEST
    local hFile:DWORD
    local bytesRead:DWORD
    local manifestData[4096]:BYTE
    
    ; Build manifest path
    invoke wsprintf, addr manifestPath, CSTR("%s\\package.json"), extensionDir
    
    ; Read manifest file
    invoke CreateFile, addr manifestPath, GENERIC_READ, FILE_SHARE_READ, NULL, \
                     OPEN_EXISTING, FILE_ATTRIBUTE_NORMAL, NULL
    mov hFile, eax
    
    .if hFile != INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE
        ; Read manifest data
        invoke ReadFile, hFile, addr manifestData, 4096, addr bytesRead, NULL
        invoke CloseHandle, hFile
        
        ; Parse manifest
        invoke ParseExtensionManifest, addr manifestData, bytesRead, addr manifest
        .if eax == TRUE
            ; Validate extension
            invoke ValidateExtension, addr manifest
            .if eax == TRUE
                ; Load extension
                invoke LoadExtension, addr manifest, extensionDir
            .endif
        .endif
    .endif
    
    ret
LoadExtensionFromDirectory endp

ParseExtensionManifest proc jsonData:DWORD, jsonSize:DWORD, manifest:DWORD
    local parserState:DWORD
    local fieldName[64]:BYTE
    local fieldValue[256]:BYTE
    
    assume manifest:ptr EXTENSION_MANIFEST
    
    ; Initialize JSON parser
    invoke JsonParser_Init, addr parserState
    
    ; Parse extension manifest
    invoke JsonParser_Parse, parserState, jsonData, jsonSize
    
    ; Extract required fields
    invoke JsonParser_GetString, parserState, CSTR("name"), addr fieldValue, 256
    invoke lstrcpyn, addr [manifest].name, addr fieldValue, MAX_EXTENSION_NAME
    
    invoke JsonParser_GetString, parserState, CSTR("version"), addr fieldValue, 256
    invoke lstrcpyn, addr [manifest].version, addr fieldValue, MAX_EXTENSION_VERSION
    
    invoke JsonParser_GetString, parserState, CSTR("author"), addr fieldValue, 256
    invoke lstrcpyn, addr [manifest].author, addr fieldValue, MAX_EXTENSION_AUTHOR
    
    invoke JsonParser_GetString, parserState, CSTR("description"), addr fieldValue, 256
    invoke lstrcpyn, addr [manifest].description, addr fieldValue, MAX_EXTENSION_DESC
    
    invoke JsonParser_GetString, parserState, CSTR("main"), addr fieldValue, 256
    invoke lstrcpyn, addr [manifest].main, addr fieldValue, MAX_PATH
    
    ; Parse extension type
    invoke JsonParser_GetString, parserState, CSTR("type"), addr fieldValue, 256
    invoke ParseExtensionType, addr fieldValue
    mov [manifest].extensionType, eax
    
    ; Parse contributions
    invoke ParseContributions, parserState, addr [manifest].contributes
    
    ; Set extension state
    mov [manifest].enabled, 1
    mov [manifest].installed, 1
    
    ; Generate extension ID
    invoke GenerateExtensionId, addr [manifest].name, addr [manifest].version
    mov [manifest].extensionId, eax
    
    return TRUE
    
ParseExtensionManifest endp

ValidateExtension proc manifest:DWORD
    local isTrusted:DWORD
    local hasRequiredFields:DWORD
    
    assume manifest:ptr EXTENSION_MANIFEST
    
    ; Check required fields
    mov hasRequiredFields, 1
    
    .if byte ptr [manifest].name == 0
        mov hasRequiredFields, 0
    .endif
    
    .if byte ptr [manifest].version == 0
        mov hasRequiredFields, 0
    .endif
    
    .if byte ptr [manifest].main == 0
        mov hasRequiredFields, 0
    .endif
    
    .if hasRequiredFields == 0
        return FALSE
    .endif
    
    ; Check publisher trust
    invoke IsPublisherTrusted, addr [manifest].publisher
    mov isTrusted, eax
    
    .if isTrusted == FALSE
        ; Ask user for permission
        invoke RequestExtensionPermission, manifest
        mov isTrusted, eax
    .endif
    
    mov eax, isTrusted
    ret
ValidateExtension endp

LoadExtension proc manifest:DWORD, extensionPath:DWORD
    local extensionHost:EXTENSION_HOST
    local hostIndex:DWORD
    local hModule:DWORD
    local initProc:DWORD
    
    ; Find free extension host slot
    invoke FindFreeExtensionHost
    mov hostIndex, eax
    
    .if hostIndex == -1
        return FALSE
    .endif
    
    ; Build full path to extension main file
    local fullPath[MAX_PATH]:BYTE
    invoke wsprintf, addr fullPath, CSTR("%s\\%s"), extensionPath, addr [manifest].main
    
    ; Load extension module
    invoke LoadLibrary, addr fullPath
    mov hModule, eax
    
    .if hModule == NULL
        return FALSE
    .endif
    
    ; Initialize extension host
    mov eax, hModule
    mov extensionHost.hModule, eax
    mov eax, [manifest].extensionId
    mov extensionHost.extensionId, eax
    mov extensionHost.initialized, 0
    mov extensionHost.ready, 0
    
    ; Create extension thread
    invoke CreateThread, NULL, 0, addr ExtensionHostThread, hostIndex, 0, addr extensionHost.threadId
    mov extensionHost.hThread, eax
    
    ; Store extension host
    mov eax, hostIndex
    mov ebx, SIZEOF EXTENSION_HOST
    mul ebx
    lea edi, extensionHosts
    add edi, eax
    assume edi:ptr EXTENSION_HOST
    
    invoke RtlMoveMemory, edi, addr extensionHost, SIZEOF EXTENSION_HOST
    
    ; Initialize extension API surface
    invoke InitializeExtensionAPI, hostIndex
    
    ; Call extension activation
    invoke ActivateExtension, hostIndex
    
    return TRUE
    
LoadExtension endp

;==============================================================================
; Phase 4.2: Extension Host and Sandboxing
;==============================================================================
ExtensionHostThread proc param:DWORD
    local hostIndex:DWORD
    local message:DWORD
    local extensionHost:EXTENSION_HOST
    
    mov eax, param
    mov hostIndex, eax
    
    ; Get extension host
    mov eax, hostIndex
    mov ebx, SIZEOF EXTENSION_HOST
    mul ebx
    lea esi, extensionHosts
    add esi, eax
    assume esi:ptr EXTENSION_HOST
    
    invoke RtlMoveMemory, addr extensionHost, esi, SIZEOF EXTENSION_HOST
    
    ; Initialize extension sandbox
    invoke InitializeExtensionSandbox, hostIndex
    
    ; Load extension API
    invoke LoadExtensionAPI, hostIndex
    
    ; Main extension message loop
    .while extensionHost.ready == 1
        ; Wait for messages
        invoke WaitForSingleObject, extensionHost.messageQueue, INFINITE
        
        ; Process extension message
        invoke GetExtensionMessage, hostIndex, addr message
        .if message != NULL
            invoke ProcessExtensionMessage, hostIndex, message
        .endif
    .endw
    
    ; Cleanup
    invoke CleanupExtensionHost, hostIndex
    
    return 0
    
ExtensionHostThread endp

InitializeExtensionSandbox proc hostIndex:DWORD
    local sandboxPolicy:DWORD
    local restrictedTokens:DWORD
    
    ; Create restricted token for extension
    invoke CreateRestrictedToken, hostIndex
    
    ; Set file system restrictions
    invoke SetFileSystemRestrictions, hostIndex
    
    ; Set network restrictions
    invoke SetNetworkRestrictions, hostIndex
    
    ; Set registry restrictions
    invoke SetRegistryRestrictions, hostIndex
    
    ; Set process restrictions
    invoke SetProcessRestrictions, hostIndex
    
    ret
InitializeExtensionSandbox endp

CreateRestrictedToken proc hostIndex:DWORD
    local hToken:DWORD
    local hRestrictedToken:DWORD
    local disableSids[256]:DWORD
    local disablePrivileges[256]:DWORD
    
    ; Get current process token
    invoke OpenProcessToken, GetCurrentProcess(), TOKEN_ASSIGN_PRIMARY or TOKEN_DUPLICATE or TOKEN_QUERY, addr hToken
    
    ; Create restricted token
    invoke CreateRestrictedToken, hToken, DISABLE_MAX_PRIVILEGE, 0, NULL, 0, NULL, 0, NULL, addr hRestrictedToken
    
    ; Apply token to extension host
    invoke SetExtensionHostToken, hostIndex, hRestrictedToken
    
    invoke CloseHandle, hToken
    
    ret
CreateRestrictedToken endp

SetFileSystemRestrictions proc hostIndex:DWORD
    ; Set file system access restrictions for extension
    
    ; Allow read access to extension directory only
    invoke AddFileSystemRule, hostIndex, CSTR("EXTENSION_DIR"), GENERIC_READ, TRUE
    
    ; Deny write access to system directories
    invoke AddFileSystemRule, hostIndex, CSTR("C:\\Windows"), GENERIC_WRITE, FALSE
    invoke AddFileSystemRule, hostIndex, CSTR("C:\\Program Files"), GENERIC_WRITE, FALSE
    invoke AddFileSystemRule, hostIndex, CSTR("C:\\Program Files (x86)"), GENERIC_WRITE, FALSE
    
    ; Allow temp directory access
    invoke AddFileSystemRule, hostIndex, CSTR("%TEMP%"), GENERIC_READ or GENERIC_WRITE, TRUE
    
    ret
SetFileSystemRestrictions endp

;==============================================================================
; Phase 4.3: Extension API Surface
;==============================================================================
InitializeExtensionAPI proc hostIndex:DWORD
    local apiIndex:DWORD
    
    ; Register core API functions
    mov apiIndex, 0
    
    ; Editor API
    invoke RegisterAPIFunction, hostIndex, API_CATEGORY_EDITOR, CSTR("getActiveEditor"), addr API_GetActiveEditor, CSTR("Get the active text editor")
    invoke RegisterAPIFunction, hostIndex, API_CATEGORY_EDITOR, CSTR("getVisibleEditors"), addr API_GetVisibleEditors, CSTR("Get all visible text editors")
    invoke RegisterAPIFunction, hostIndex, API_CATEGORY_EDITOR, CSTR("createTextEditor"), addr API_CreateTextEditor, CSTR("Create a new text editor")
    invoke RegisterAPIFunction, hostIndex, API_CATEGORY_EDITOR, CSTR("showTextDocument"), addr API_ShowTextDocument, CSTR("Show a text document in editor")
    
    ; Workspace API
    invoke RegisterAPIFunction, hostIndex, API_CATEGORY_WORKSPACE, CSTR("getWorkspaceFolders"), addr API_GetWorkspaceFolders, CSTR("Get workspace folders")
    invoke RegisterAPIFunction, hostIndex, API_CATEGORY_WORKSPACE, CSTR("openTextDocument"), addr API_OpenTextDocument, CSTR("Open a text document")
    invoke RegisterAPIFunction, hostIndex, API_CATEGORY_WORKSPACE, CSTR("saveTextDocument"), addr API_SaveTextDocument, CSTR("Save a text document")
    invoke RegisterAPIFunction, hostIndex, API_CATEGORY_WORKSPACE, CSTR("createFile"), addr API_CreateFile, CSTR("Create a new file")
    
    ; Commands API
    invoke RegisterAPIFunction, hostIndex, API_CATEGORY_COMMANDS, CSTR("registerCommand"), addr API_RegisterCommand, CSTR("Register a command")
    invoke RegisterAPIFunction, hostIndex, API_CATEGORY_COMMANDS, CSTR("executeCommand"), addr API_ExecuteCommand, CSTR("Execute a command")
    invoke RegisterAPIFunction, hostIndex, API_CATEGORY_COMMANDS, CSTR("getCommands"), addr API_GetCommands, CSTR("Get all commands")
    
    ; Language API
    invoke RegisterAPIFunction, hostIndex, API_CATEGORY_LANGUAGE, CSTR("registerCompletionProvider"), addr API_RegisterCompletionProvider, CSTR("Register completion provider")
    invoke RegisterAPIFunction, hostIndex, API_CATEGORY_LANGUAGE, CSTR("registerHoverProvider"), addr API_RegisterHoverProvider, CSTR("Register hover provider")
    invoke RegisterAPIFunction, hostIndex, API_CATEGORY_LANGUAGE, CSTR("registerDefinitionProvider"), addr API_RegisterDefinitionProvider, CSTR("Register definition provider")
    invoke RegisterAPIFunction, hostIndex, API_CATEGORY_LANGUAGE, CSTR("registerDiagnosticProvider"), addr API_RegisterDiagnosticProvider, CSTR("Register diagnostic provider")
    
    ; UI API
    invoke RegisterAPIFunction, hostIndex, API_CATEGORY_UI, CSTR("showInformationMessage"), addr API_ShowInformationMessage, CSTR("Show information message")
    invoke RegisterAPIFunction, hostIndex, API_CATEGORY_UI, CSTR("showWarningMessage"), addr API_ShowWarningMessage, CSTR("Show warning message")
    invoke RegisterAPIFunction, hostIndex, API_CATEGORY_UI, CSTR("showErrorMessage"), addr API_ShowErrorMessage, CSTR("Show error message")
    invoke RegisterAPIFunction, hostIndex, API_CATEGORY_UI, CSTR("setStatusBarMessage"), addr API_SetStatusBarMessage, CSTR("Set status bar message")
    
    ret
InitializeExtensionAPI endp

RegisterAPIFunction proc hostIndex:DWORD, category:DWORD, functionName:DWORD, functionPtr:DWORD, description:DWORD
    local apiEntry:EXTENSION_API
    
    ; Fill API entry
    mov eax, category
    mov apiEntry.category, eax
    invoke lstrcpyn, addr apiEntry.functionName, functionName, 64
    mov eax, functionPtr
    mov apiEntry.functionPtr, eax
    invoke lstrcpyn, addr apiEntry.description, description, 128
    mov apiEntry.deprecated, 0
    
    ; Add to API surface
    invoke AddAPISurfaceEntry, hostIndex, addr apiEntry
    
    ret
RegisterAPIFunction endp

;==============================================================================
; Phase 4.4: Extension Contributions System
;==============================================================================
ProcessExtensionContributions proc manifest:DWORD
    local contributions:DWORD
    local commands:DWORD
    local menus:DWORD
    local languages:DWORD
    
    assume manifest:ptr EXTENSION_MANIFEST
    
    ; Get contributions
    mov eax, [manifest].contributes
    mov contributions, eax
    
    .if contributions != NULL
        ; Process commands
        invoke GetContributionCommands, contributions, addr commands
        .if commands != NULL
            invoke RegisterExtensionCommands, commands, [manifest].extensionId
        .endif
        
        ; Process menus
        invoke GetContributionMenus, contributions, addr menus
        .if menus != NULL
            invoke RegisterExtensionMenus, menus, [manifest].extensionId
        .endif
        
        ; Process languages
        invoke GetContributionLanguages, contributions, addr languages
        .if languages != NULL
            invoke RegisterExtensionLanguages, languages, [manifest].extensionId
        .endif
    .endif
    
    ret
ProcessExtensionContributions endp

RegisterExtensionCommands proc commands:DWORD, extensionId:DWORD
    local i:DWORD
    local commandCount:DWORD
    
    ; Get command count
    invoke GetCommandCount, commands
    mov commandCount, eax
    
    mov i, 0
    .while i < commandCount
        mov eax, i
        mov ebx, SIZEOF COMMAND_CONTRIBUTION
        mul ebx
        add eax, commands
        assume eax:ptr COMMAND_CONTRIBUTION
        
        ; Register command
        invoke RegisterCommand, addr [eax].command, addr [eax].title, addr [eax].category, extensionId
        
        inc i
    .endw
    
    ret
RegisterExtensionCommands endp

RegisterExtensionMenus proc menus:DWORD, extensionId:DWORD
    local i:DWORD
    local menuCount:DWORD
    
    invoke GetMenuCount, menus
    mov menuCount, eax
    
    mov i, 0
    .while i < menuCount
        mov eax, i
        mov ebx, SIZEOF MENU_CONTRIBUTION
        mul ebx
        add eax, menus
        assume eax:ptr MENU_CONTRIBUTION
        
        ; Register menu item
        invoke RegisterMenuItem, addr [eax].command, addr [eax].when, addr [eax].group, extensionId
        
        inc i
    .endw
    
    ret
RegisterExtensionMenus endp

;==============================================================================
; Phase 4.5: Extension Commands and Actions
;==============================================================================
ExecuteExtensionCommand proc commandId:DWORD, args:DWORD
    local extensionId:DWORD
    local commandHandler:DWORD
    local result:DWORD
    
    ; Find extension that registered this command
    invoke FindCommandExtension, commandId
    mov extensionId, eax
    
    .if extensionId == -1
        return FALSE
    .endif
    
    ; Get command handler
    invoke GetCommandHandler, commandId
    mov commandHandler, eax
    
    .if commandHandler == NULL
        return FALSE
    .endif
    
    ; Execute command in extension host
    invoke ExecuteInExtensionHost, extensionId, commandHandler, args, addr result
    
    mov eax, result
    ret
ExecuteExtensionCommand endp

; Phase 4.6: Extension Settings and Configuration
;==============================================================================
LoadExtensionSettings proc extensionId:DWORD
    local settingsPath[MAX_PATH]:BYTE
    local hFile:DWORD
    local settingsData[8192]:BYTE
    local bytesRead:DWORD
    
    ; Build settings path
    invoke wsprintf, addr settingsPath, CSTR("%s\\extensions\\%d\\settings.json"), \
                     addr appDataPath, extensionId
    
    ; Read settings file
    invoke CreateFile, addr settingsPath, GENERIC_READ, FILE_SHARE_READ, NULL, \
                     OPEN_EXISTING, FILE_ATTRIBUTE_NORMAL, NULL
    mov hFile, eax
    
    .if hFile != INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE
        invoke ReadFile, hFile, addr settingsData, 8192, addr bytesRead, NULL
        invoke CloseHandle, hFile
        
        ; Parse settings
        invoke ParseExtensionSettings, extensionId, addr settingsData, bytesRead
    .endif
    
    ret
LoadExtensionSettings endp

SaveExtensionSettings proc extensionId:DWORD
    local settingsPath[MAX_PATH]:BYTE
    local hFile:DWORD
    local settingsJson[4096]:BYTE
    local bytesWritten:DWORD
    
    ; Build settings path
    invoke wsprintf, addr settingsPath, CSTR("%s\\extensions\\%d\\settings.json"), \
                     addr appDataPath, extensionId
    
    ; Convert settings to JSON
    invoke ExtensionSettingsToJson, extensionId, addr settingsJson, 4096
    
    ; Write settings file
    invoke CreateFile, addr settingsPath, GENERIC_WRITE, 0, NULL, \
                     CREATE_ALWAYS, FILE_ATTRIBUTE_NORMAL, NULL
    mov hFile, eax
    
    .if hFile != INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE
        invoke lstrlen, addr settingsJson
        invoke WriteFile, hFile, addr settingsJson, eax, addr bytesWritten, NULL
        invoke CloseHandle, hFile
    .endif
    
    ret
SaveExtensionSettings endp

SearchExtensions proc query:DWORD, category:DWORD, sortBy:DWORD
    local searchResults:DWORD
    local resultCount:DWORD
    
    ; Initialize search
    mov resultCount, 0
    
    ; Search local extensions
    invoke SearchLocalExtensions, query, category, searchResults, resultCount
    
    ; Search online marketplace
    invoke SearchMarketplace, query, category, sortBy, searchResults, resultCount
    
    mov eax, resultCount

SearchExtensions endp

InstallExtension proc extensionId:DWORD, version:DWORD
    local downloadUrl[512]:BYTE
    local tempPath[MAX_PATH]:BYTE
    local extensionPath[MAX_PATH]:BYTE
    
    ; Get download URL
    invoke GetExtensionDownloadUrl, extensionId, version, addr downloadUrl
    
    ; Download extension
    invoke GetTempPath, MAX_PATH, addr tempPath
    invoke wsprintf, addr extensionPath, CSTR("%s\\extension_%d.zip"), addr tempPath, extensionId
    
    invoke DownloadFile, addr downloadUrl, addr extensionPath
    
    ; Extract extension
    invoke ExtractExtension, addr extensionPath, extensionId
    
    ; Load extension
    invoke LoadInstalledExtension, extensionId
    
    ret
InstallExtension endp

; Phase 4.8: Extension Security and Permissions
;==============================================================================
ValidateExtensionPermissions proc manifest:DWORD
    local permissions:DWORD
    local permissionCount:DWORD
    local i:DWORD
    local isValid:DWORD
    
    assume manifest:ptr EXTENSION_MANIFEST
    
    mov isValid, 1
    
    ; Get requested permissions
    invoke GetExtensionPermissions, manifest, addr permissions, addr permissionCount
    
    mov i, 0
    .while i < permissionCount
        ; Validate each permission
        invoke ValidatePermission, permissions, i
        .if eax == FALSE
            mov isValid, 0
            .break
        .endif
        
        inc i
    .endw
    
    mov eax, isValid
    ret
ValidateExtensionPermissions endp

RequestExtensionPermission proc manifest:DWORD
    local permissionDialog[512]:BYTE
    local userResponse:DWORD
    
    assume manifest:ptr EXTENSION_MANIFEST
    
    ; Build permission request dialog
    invoke wsprintf, addr permissionDialog, CSTR("Extension '%s' requests the following permissions:\n\n"), addr [manifest].name
    
    ; Show permission dialog
    invoke MessageBox, hMainWnd, addr permissionDialog, CSTR("Extension Permission Request"), MB_YESNO or MB_ICONQUESTION
    mov userResponse, eax
    
    .if userResponse == IDYES
        return TRUE
    .else
        return FALSE
    .endif
    
    ret
RequestExtensionPermission endp

ActivateExtension proc extensionId:DWORD
    local hostIndex:DWORD
    local extensionHost:EXTENSION_HOST
    
    ; Find extension host
    invoke FindExtensionHost, extensionId
    mov hostIndex, eax
    
    .if hostIndex == -1
        return FALSE
    .endif
    
    ; Get extension host
    mov eax, hostIndex
    mov ebx, SIZEOF EXTENSION_HOST
    mul ebx
    lea esi, extensionHosts
    add esi, eax
    assume esi:ptr EXTENSION_HOST
    
    ; Check if already activated
    .if [esi].initialized == 1
        return TRUE
    .endif
    
    ; Initialize extension
    mov [esi].initialized, 1
    
    ; Send activation event
    invoke SendExtensionEvent, extensionId, CSTR("activate"), NULL
    
    ; Call extension activation function
    invoke CallExtensionActivate, hostIndex
    
    return TRUE
    
ActivateExtension endp

DeactivateExtension proc extensionId:DWORD
    local hostIndex:DWORD
    
    ; Find extension host
    invoke FindExtensionHost, extensionId
    mov hostIndex, eax
    
    .if hostIndex == -1
        return FALSE
    .endif
    
    ; Send deactivation event
    invoke SendExtensionEvent, extensionId, CSTR("deactivate"), NULL
    
    ; Call extension deactivation function
    invoke CallExtensionDeactivate, hostIndex
    
    ; Unload extension
    invoke UnloadExtension, extensionId
    
    return TRUE
    
DeactivateExtension endp

UnloadExtension proc extensionId:DWORD
    local hostIndex:DWORD
    local extensionHost:EXTENSION_HOST
    
    ; Find extension host
    invoke FindExtensionHost, extensionId
    mov hostIndex, eax
    
    .if hostIndex == -1
        return FALSE
    .endif
    
    ; Get extension host
    mov eax, hostIndex
    mov ebx, SIZEOF EXTENSION_HOST
    mul ebx
    lea esi, extensionHosts
    add esi, eax
    assume esi:ptr EXTENSION_HOST
    
    ; Signal thread to stop
    mov [esi].ready, 0
    
    ; Wait for thread to exit
    invoke WaitForSingleObject, [esi].hThread, 5000
    
    ; Close thread handle
    invoke CloseHandle, [esi].hThread
    
    ; Unload module
    invoke FreeLibrary, [esi].hModule
    
    ; Clear extension host slot
    invoke ZeroMemory, esi, SIZEOF EXTENSION_HOST
    
    return TRUE
    
UnloadExtension endp

    local i:DWORD
    
    mov i, 0

        mov eax, i
        mov ebx, SIZEOF EXTENSION_HOST
        mul ebx
        lea esi, extensionHosts
        add esi, eax
        assume esi:ptr EXTENSION_HOST
        
        .if [esi].extensionId == 0
            mov eax, i
            ret
        .endif
        
        inc i
    .endw
    
    mov eax, -1
    ret

        lea esi, extensionHosts

        assume esi:ptr EXTENSION_HOST

    ret
```
